# White Labelled Platform for Programmatic Ad Buying | PublifyX

PublifyX offers a White Labelled Platform for agencies, networks, and startups to launch their own DSPs for programmatic ad buying across Display, Video, Audio, and CTV formats. Get started without coding or infrastructure hassle.

## Platform Overview

[PublifyX: White Labelled Platform for Programmatic Ad Buying](https://publifyx.com/): This page provides an overview of the PublifyX platform, detailing its capabilities for programmatic ad buying and the benefits of using a white-labelled solution.

[White Labelled Platform for Programmatic Ad Buying | PublifyX](https://publifyx.com/contact): Another entry that elaborates on the features and advantages of the PublifyX platform, emphasizing its ease of use for agencies and startups.

[White Labelled Platform for Programmatic Ad Buying | PublifyX](https://publifyx.com/ad-insights): A repeat of the previous entry, reinforcing the platform's offerings and its suitability for various advertising formats.

[White Labelled Platform for Programmatic Ad Buying | PublifyX](https://publifyx.com/white-label-dsp): This link reiterates the platform's capabilities, focusing on the seamless integration for users looking to enter the programmatic advertising space.

## Advertising Formats

[Connected Tv Advertising - PublifyX](https://publifyx.com/connected-tv-advertising): This page discusses the specific offerings related to Connected TV advertising within the PublifyX platform, highlighting its relevance in the current advertising landscape.

## Legal Information

[Privacy Policy - PublifyX](https://publifyx.com/privacy_policy): The privacy policy outlines how PublifyX handles user data, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations and providing transparency to users.
